sentences.arabic: تَمَيَّزَ فَنُّ الْمَقَامَةِ فِي الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ بِأُسْلُوبِهِ السَّجْعِيِّ الْفَرِيدِ، وَهُوَ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْحِكْمَةِ وَالنَّقْدِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ بِطَرِيقَةٍ ذَكِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnost makame u arapskoj književnosti odlikovala se svojim jedinstvenim stilom u rimi, spajajući mudrost i društvenu kritiku na inteligentan način.
sentences.translationEn: The art of the Maqama in Arabic literature was distinguished by its unique rhymed prose style, combining wisdom and social criticism in a clever way.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْمَقَامَاتُ تَرْوِي قِصَصًا لِأَبْطَالٍ يَتَّسِمُونَ بِالْفَصَاحَةِ وَالْبَيَانِ، مِمَّا يَعْكِسُ مَكَانَةَ اللُّغَةِ فِي ذَلِكَ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Makame su pričale priče o junacima koje je krasila rječitost i jasnoća izražavanja, što odražava status jezika u tom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: The Maqamas told stories of heroes characterized by eloquence and clarity, reflecting the status of language in that era.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الْهَدَفُ مِنَ الْحِكَايَةِ التَّسْلِيَةَ فَقَطْ، بَلْ كَانَ الْكَاتِبُ يَسْعَى إِلَى تَعْلِيمِ الْقَارِئِ مَفْرَدَاتٍ لُغَوِيَّةً نَادِرَةً.
sentences.translation: Cilj priče nije bio samo zabava, već je pisac nastojao naučiti čitaoca rijetkim jezičkim pojmovima.
sentences.translationEn: The goal of the story was not just entertainment; rather, the writer sought to teach the reader rare linguistic vocabulary.

sentences.arabic: بِالرَّغْمِ مِنَ التَّعْقِيدِ اللَّفْظِيِّ، إِلَّا أَنَّ الْقِصَّةَ تَبْقَى مُتَمَاسِكَةً وَتَحْمِلُ رِسَالَةً أَخْلَاقِيَّةً عَمِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Uprkos verbalnoj složenosti, priča ostaje koherentna i nosi duboku moralnu poruku.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the verbal complexity, the story remains coherent and carries a deep moral message.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا النَّوْعَ مِنَ النَّثْرِ يُمَثِّلُ ذِرْوَةَ الْإِبْدَاعِ اللُّغَوِيِّ فِي التَّارِيخِ الْأَدَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta proze predstavlja vrhunac jezičke kreativnosti u književnoj historiji.
sentences.translationEn: This type of prose represents the pinnacle of linguistic creativity in literary history.

sentences.arabic: وَتُعَدُّ مَقَامَاتُ الْهَمَذَانِيِّ وَالْحَرِيرِيِّ مِنْ أَبْرَزِ مَا كُتِبَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ الْوَاسِعِ.
sentences.translation: Makame El-Hamadanija i El-Haririja smatraju se najistaknutijim djelima napisanim u ovoj širokoj oblasti.
sentences.translationEn: The Maqamas of al-Hamadhani and al-Hariri are among the most prominent works written in this vast field.
